title: How it works
description: Find out how to get started

setup-wallet.title: Setup Your wallet
setup-wallet.proposal: Set up your wallet of choice. Connect it to the Animarket by clicking the wallet icon in the top right corner.

create-collection.title: Create Collection
create-collection.proposal: Upload your work and setup your collection. Add a description, social links and floor price.

start-buying.title: Start Buying
start-buying.proposal: Description: Explore the gallery and purchase your favorite NFTs with your connected wallet.
